markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content updates and plan the upcoming PSEO initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Updates:** All articles need a universal update to replace the incorrect "decision intelligence platform" descriptor with more accurate, descriptive language.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**PSEO Initiative:** A new initiative will launch a high-velocity (10 pages/week) library of templated pages on "pricing factors by line of business."](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**PSEO Workflow:** HX will design the page template in Figma, then connect with GrowthX engineering to ensure a smooth Framer/CMS integration for automated content population.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Weekly syncs will shift to biweekly after the PSEO initiative stabilizes, focusing future meetings on strategy and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Updates

  - [**Problem:** Staged articles contain outdated product names and an incorrect platform descriptor.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Solution:** A universal update will be implemented across all content.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Product Names:** Chris (HX) is creating a Notion table with correct naming conventions (e.g., "underwriting agent" instead of "underwriter co-pilot").](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Platform Descriptor:** The incorrect "decision intelligence platform" will be replaced.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
          - [**Rationale:** David (HX) noted this is an AI-generated term that can quickly become outdated.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
          - [**New Approach:** Use more descriptive phrases to provide variation for the AI writing engine.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**New Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Competitive Articles:** GrowthX will draft comparisons for Accurate and WTW without formal battle cards to test the quality of this approach.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Underwriting Focus:** Frankie (HX) is asking Chris (HX) for input on adding more underwriting platform content to existing pricing-focused articles.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### PSEO Initiative: "Pricing Factors by Line of Business"

  - [**Goal:** Launch a high-velocity content library (10 pages/week) on "pricing factors by line of business" using a highly templated page structure.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Workflow & Dependencies:**](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Design:** HX design team (led by Mai) will create the page template in Figma.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [**Engineering:** A call will be scheduled between HX design and GrowthX engineering (Kirkland) to ensure a smooth Framer/CMS integration.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [**Taxonomy:** HX will review the updated taxonomy list to confirm which lines of business get unique pages vs. grouped pages.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Imagery:** The approach is TBD, pending the final template design from HX.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Support:** Bailey (GrowthX) will provide PSEO best-in-class examples to inform the HX design team.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Operations & Logistics

  - [**Blog Images:** Publish new articles without images for now. Frankie (HX) will add the final assets from the CMS once the new style guide is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Blog Categories:** Frankie (HX) will provide a final list of blog categories by early next week for GrowthX to implement backend tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**2026 Goal Sessions:** Schedule for late January to align with HX's internal planning.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Shift to biweekly syncs after PSEO stabilizes.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Communication:** Frankie (HX) will investigate adding GrowthX as guests to HX Teams to streamline communication.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Frankie (HX):**](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [Share Chris's Notion table of product names and platform descriptors.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [Confirm the PSEO taxonomy list.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Schedule the PSEO design/engineering sync with Mai and Kirkland.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Provide the final blog category list by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Investigate adding GrowthX as guests to HX Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [**Bailey (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [Update all articles with new naming conventions and platform descriptors.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Draft competitive articles for Accurate and WTW.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [Share PSEO best-in-class examples.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [Update recurring sync to 11:30 AM ET.](https://fathom.video/share/T5_d7HVbjQXxTsAHsH94L5PTFZMgJSRh?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
